title: Matter trace precheck
verified_behaviors: Binds RP00.P02.M03.S04 to Hermes Validation Matter trace precheck
Accepts only S03 allow_metadata_only Hermes Validation tenant-boundary precheck results
Allows Matter-scoped metadata with present same-tenant Matter context
Allows firm-level metadata with no Matter context and no Matter-required claims
Denies Matter-required claims when Matter context is absent
Covers defense-in-depth Matter tenant missing and mismatch result-validator refs

Rejects Matter trace bypass, runtime/write, tenant lifecycle mutation, Hermes execution/evidence, requirement trace bypass, human approval bypass, Hermes gate bypass, Claude review bypass, and unknown claims fail-closed
Carries validation context ids, TEN-001 through TEN-008 trace refs, acceptance gates, M00 refs, permission_decision_ref, and audit_event_ref
Does not create runtime routes or execute service logic
Does not mutate tenant lifecycle state
Does not run Hermes validation or create Hermes evidence as product runtime behavior
Does not replace human approval, H00, or C00
Does not use real data or write product state
Hands off to RP00.P02.M03.S05 Permission precheck
human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: No human approval is required for this deterministic synthetic metadata-only control-plane subphase; explicit next boundary is RP00.P02.M03.S05 Permission precheck.
